description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsMaroon satchel, two front external zippers, two zipped pockets on either side, one main compartment with toggle strap, external flap with lobster clasp, one adjustable strap that is separable with a zip, one internal zipped pocket and mobile pouch, contrast stitched detailing along the edgesMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe with cloth when requiredSizeLength: 35 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 10 cm
